overall.description: Third-person gameplay from The Witcher 3 featuring Geralt walking through a medieval European town with timber-framed buildings and cobblestone streets. The character briefly enters a rustic interior with stone walls before continuing through narrow back alleys and covered passages.

scene_state.functional_zone: medieval town main street with market stalls

events.description: Geralt approaches and enters a stone building with arched doorway

agents.ego_description: Geralt walking steadily through the town street, passing market stalls and NPCs

notable_agents.action: NPC in red tunic walking ahead of Geralt along the street
NPC in blue coat standing near wooden railing, gesturing

entered.detail: Multi-story half-timbered medieval house with white plaster and dark wooden beams
Tall timber-framed structure with stone foundation and wooden balconies
Worn cobblestone road surface with scattered wooden planks
Active campfire with NPCs gathered around cooking
Market stall covered with orange canvas cloth selling goods
Circular timber building with conical roof in the town square ahead

segments.scene_description: Geralt walks through a sunlit medieval town street lined with half-timbered houses. The cobblestone road features scattered wooden planks and an active campfire where NPCs gather. Market stalls with orange tarps line the left side as the character approaches a stone building entrance.

scene_state.functional_zone: rustic interior with stone fireplace and wooden furnishings

events.description: Geralt exits the building back into the outdoor town environment

agents.ego_description: Geralt enters the dimly lit building and walks toward the stone fireplace at the back

entered.detail: Large stone fireplace with burning fire illuminating the room
Wooden shelving unit holding pottery jars and cooking utensils
Simple wooden bench against the left wall
Rough-hewn stone block walls surrounding the interior

segments.scene_description: Inside a rustic stone building, warm firelight illuminates wooden shelves holding pottery and a simple bench. Geralt walks through the single room toward the back fireplace before turning to exit.

events.description: Geralt turns slightly right to navigate around market stalls and pedestrians

agents.ego_description: Geralt walking through the town square, navigating around NPCs and market stalls

notable_agents.action: Female NPC in green dress walking alongside Geralt

entered.detail: Stone archway connecting two buildings overhead, forming a covered passage
Construction scaffolding made of rough timber beams against a building
Market stall with beige canvas covering and wooden posts

segments.scene_description: Back outside, Geralt navigates through a bustling town square with timber buildings and market stalls. A stone archway spans the street ahead while wooden scaffolding indicates construction on the right. The character moves through moderate crowds of NPCs.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow back alleys and covered wooden passage

events.description: Geralt enters a covered wooden passage between stone buildings

agents.ego_description: Geralt walking through narrow alleys, passing wooden fences and entering a covered gateway

notable_agents.action: NPC in green tunic walking toward Geralt in the narrow alley

entered.detail: Covered wooden passage with support beams connecting two stone buildings
Rough wooden picket fence lining the left side of the alley
Wooden cart with burning fire beside it, illuminating the alley

segments.scene_description: The environment narrows into back alleys with dirt ground and wooden fences. Geralt passes a burning cart and enters a covered wooden passage between close timber buildings. The lighting becomes more diffused and shadowed as the character moves through the enclosed space.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a sunlit medieval town that gradually transitions from open, bustling streets into narrow, shadowed alleys. It begins on a cobblestone road lined with half-timbered houses and orange market stalls, moving past a flickering campfire toward the entrance of a stone building. As the camera enters the rustic interior, the bright daylight shifts to warm firelight illuminating pottery and wooden shelves before the character turns to exit back into the town. The scene then expands into a crowded square featuring a stone archway and wooden scaffolding, before the path narrows into dirt back alleys. Finally, the environment shifts from the open square to a diffused, shadowed atmosphere as the camera passes a burning cart and enters a covered wooden passage between towering timber buildings.
